resources.string: Front camera ready. Hold the phone comfortably and look naturally at the screen.
No face detected. Keep one face visible to the front camera.
Camera permission is required to track gaze.
Keep both eyes visible to the front camera.
Look at the center target and tap it to capture calibration
Look at and tap the center target
Tap registered. Live gaze tracking is now using that target position.
Keep both eyes visible to the front camera, then press Start. When the target appears, look at it and tap it to capture calibration.
Keep your face visible to the front camera, then look at and tap the middle target to capture calibration.

Step 1 of 2: Keep your face visible to the front camera and make sure both eyes are visible.\n\nStep 2 of 2: After tapping Start, look at the center target and tap it while keeping both your head and phone as steady as possible.

Inference: -- ms
Resolution: --
Calibration samples: --
Face conf: -- left: -- right: --
Pose: yaw=-- pitch=-- roll=--
Anchors: nose=(--, --) eyes=(--, --)
Raw gaze: --
Smooth gaze: --
Scale correction: --
Tap the button above to grant Camera permission. If permission was permanently denied, open the app settings and enable Camera.
